name: Speedy Credit Repair Inc.
description_short: Speedy Credit Repair disputes inaccurate and unfair items on credit reports using 30+ years of expertise. Offers free credit review, real scores from all three bureaus, and transparent tracking via personal portal.
description_long:
Speedy Credit Repair is a credit repair company based in Huntington Beach, California, operating since at least the mid-1990s based on their claim of 30+ years of experience. They specialize in identifying and disputing inaccurate, obsolete, or unfair negative items on credit reports across Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion. The company positions itself as an ethical alternative to high-pressure credit repair firms, emphasizing transparency and realistic expectations rather than guaranteed outcomes.

Their core service is credit dispute filing—they examine client credit reports, identify problematic items, and submit disputes on the client's behalf. They provide a free initial credit review with scores from all three bureaus (no hard inquiry), followed by a consultation with a specialist. Clients receive portal access to track disputes filed, account updates, and credit score movement. According to their website, most clients see movement within 30-45 days, though they note that plan details vary. They also offer educational content on credit-building strategies, including secured cards, rental reporting, and auto/personal loans.

What distinguishes Speedy Credit Repair is their emphasis on specialist consultation over automated sales processes. They claim to employ credit professionals rather than salespeople, offer a 24-hour personalized credit review turnaround, and provide 24/7 availability. They highlight client reviews across multiple platforms (4.8 stars on Yelp with 86 reviews, 4.8 on Google with 40 reviews) and stress that their business model depends on integrity and actual results with past clients. They also offer full-service options with ongoing portal monitoring.

However, potential clients should note several limitations: The website makes no specific promises about score improvement amounts or timelines beyond the vague "30-45 days" estimate. They require a phone consultation before pricing is disclosed, which is standard industry practice but limits transparency. While they claim ethical practices, credit repair inherently involves disputing items on behalf of clients—a service that works best when reports contain genuine errors rather than legitimate negative information. Their free offer is limited-time, and full services require payment at undisclosed rates.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free credit review from all three bureaus with no hard inquiry and no credit card required
24-hour personalized credit review turnaround from a 30+ year credit specialist
Personal portal to track every dispute filed, account updated, and point gained in real-time
Claims most clients see credit movement within 30-45 days
High online review ratings across multiple platforms (4.8+ stars on Yelp and Google)
24/7 availability and open 7 days a week
Transparent about limitations and claims to prioritize realistic expectations over sales pitches
cons: Pricing and service plan details are not disclosed on website; requires phone consultation
No specific guarantees about credit score improvement amounts or timelines
Limited-time free offer creates urgency marketing that may not reflect actual value
Service effectiveness depends entirely on presence of actual errors on credit reports; cannot legally remove accurate negative information
Website does not clearly explain the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) compliance or consumer rights
best_for: Consumers with confirmed errors or inaccurate items on their credit reports
People seeking professional dispute guidance without sales-heavy pressure
Those wanting transparent tracking and real-time portal access to dispute progress
Individuals with 30+ year specialist consultation preference over automated services
diagnosis: Speedy Credit Repair is best for consumers who have verified errors on their credit reports and want professional dispute assistance with transparent tracking and specialist guidance. The primary caveat is that credit repair services can only legally remove inaccurate or unverifiable items—they cannot remove accurate negative information, and results depend entirely on what errors exist in the first place.
services: Credit report disputes across all three bureaus (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion)
Free credit score pull from all three bureaus with no hard inquiry
Free personalized credit review within 24 hours
Personal portal access to track disputes and credit score changes
Specialist consultation and credit profile analysis
Educational blog content on credit topics
Credit score factor breakdown and analysis
Debt negotiation education and settlement guidance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
